message:
fix: idle detection and log permissions for kick-agents.sh (#16)

* feat: pin timers to clock (scanner :00/:15/:30/:45, reviewer :00/:30, architect :00); add architect to kick script; send Enter separately

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: idle detection for Claude Code prompt (❯ + non-breaking space) and log file permissions

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
